mapper.sql: id, name, position, department, email, phone, manager_id, avatar, level, join_date
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employees ORDER BY level, name
SELECT FROM employees WHERE LOWER(department) = LOWER(#{department}) ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM employees WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY name

SELECT FROM employees WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(position) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(department) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY name
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM employees WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM employees WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND id != #{id}

SELECT FROM employees WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees (id, name, position, department, email, phone, manager_id, avatar, level, join_date) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{position}, #{department}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{managerId}, #{avatar}, #{level}, #{joinDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET name = #{name}, position = #{position}, department = #{department}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, manager_id = #{managerId}, avatar = #{avatar}, level = #{level}, join_date = #{joinDate} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE employees SET manager_id = #{managerId} WHERE id = #{id}
